versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   minio-14-1-2                    true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: minio
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: minio-14-1-2
      name: minio
      namespace: minio
      values: |
        minio:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/minio
